name: session_redactor_status
description: Get Session Redactor aggregate stats: total files processed, total redactions made, and last processing timestamp. Use this to understand how much sensitive data has been cleaned.

name: session_redactor_sweep
description: Run a full sweep of all Claude session transcripts (~/.claude/projects/). Detects and redacts API keys, passwords, tokens, and other secrets. Returns count of files processed and total redactions made.

name: session_redactor_redact
description: Redact sensitive data from a single .jsonl transcript file. Parses JSON, recursively walks all string values, applies all 16 detection patterns (API keys, passwords, tokens, AWS, SSH, etc.), and atomically writes the cleaned file back.

name: session_redactor_patterns
description: List all sensitive data detection patterns with their names and categories. Categories include: password, api_key, token, aws_key, aws_secret, ssh_key, db_password, generic_secret.

name: session_redactor_history
description: Get recent session transcript processing records. Shows which files were processed, how many redactions were made, and what triggered each processing run.
